title: PTDT OpenMI v32 Exchange Item
description: JSON Schema defining the structure of data exchanged between solvers when utilizing REST/JSON bindings over the OpenMI interface.

model_id.description: Unique identifier for the source or target model instance (e.g., 'hec-ras-2d-reach1').

timestamp.description: The exact simulation time (ISO 8601) corresponding to this data exchange.

quantity_id.description: The physical quantity being exchanged. Must map to the PTDT global ontology.

values.description: The ordered array of scalar values corresponding one-to-one with the element set.
